source_pr.title: *: support common aggregation functions elimination.
source_pr.body:
For query "select sum(a), sum(b) , sum(a) + sum(b) from t;", currently we put sum(a), sum(b), sum(a), sum(b) to aggregation. Instead, we should only consider sum(a) and sum(b).

@shenli @coocood @XuHuaiyu PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select sum(t.a + t.b), sum(t.a + t.c), sum(t.a + t.b), count(t.a) from t having sum(t.a + t.b) > 0 order by sum(t.a + t.c)", (plan/plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select sum(t.a + t.b), sum(t.a + t.c), sum(t.a + t.b), count(t.a) from t having sum(t.a + t.b) > 0 order by sum(t.a + t.c)", (plan/plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select sum(t.a + t.b), sum(t.a + t.c), sum(t.a + t.b), count(t.a) from t having sum(t.a + t.b) > 0 order by sum(t.a + t.c)", (plan/plan_test.go)
files: executor/aggregate_test.go, expression/aggregation.go, expression/expression.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/plan_test.go, plan/stringer.go
